rationale: Diffed the full exported symbol table (every func/type/var declaration starting with a capital letter) between 68fe576e and ad56c295 in internal/config/config.go: zero lines differ. The fix commit's only source-level change is inside the unexported validateGates function -- the two recovery-clause repeats of an attacker/typo-controlled string that were %s (unescaped) are now strconv.Quote(...), plus explanatory comments citing round-1 G1.1 -- and two new test functions (TestLoad_UnknownGateKeyEscapesControlBytes, plus the cursorReset fixture appended to TestPanelGateSlots_DeterministicExpansion). None of PanelGateExpectedReviewers/PanelGateApproveThresholdExpr/PanelGateReviewerSlots/PanelGateAdvisoryDefault/PanelGateKeys/CountValue/KnownModels/GatePanel/Panel.Note/Substitution.Substitutes changed signature, return shape, or documented behavior -- everything Bead 2/3 are planned to consume from this commit is untouched. go build ./internal/config/... ./cmd/mindspec/... is clean and git status is untouched. My round-1 finding (ReviewerSlot lacks json tags -- non-blocking, matches existing codebase convention of local JSON-tagged response structs) is unaffected by this delta since ReviewerSlot's declaration did not change.

findings.description: Line-for-line diff of every capitalized func/type/var declaration between 68fe576e and ad56c295 is empty -- the fix touches only message-string construction inside unexported validateGates (strconv.Quote fix for two recovery-clause repeats) plus test-only additions. No signature, field, or behavior change reaches any symbol Bead 2 or Bead 3 are documented to consume.
